_docs: See toon-protocol/toon-meta CONTEXT.md#the-gate — this file is consumed by the toon-meta read-only GATE.md/FACTORY.md rollup
method: Representative sample = the 5 most recent `push`-to-`main` runs of .github/workflows/ci.yml as of capturedAt, read via `gh run list --workflow=ci.yml --json ...` / `gh run view <id> --json jobs` / `gh api repos/toon-protocol/toon/actions/runs/<id>/timing`. Correctness counts taken directly from a clean checkout of capturedFromCommit via `npx eslint . -f json` and `pnpm run typecheck`, not from CI logs (CI truncates neither, but a local run is simpler to reproduce byte-for-byte). See `sampleRuns` for the raw per-run figures this baseline was averaged from. NOTE for reproduction: verify tests via `pnpm -r test --if-present` (what CI runs), not the root `vitest run` script — the root vitest.config.ts omits the `TOON_GENESIS_PEERS: '[]'` hermetic-fixture env that packages/sdk/vitest.config.ts sets, so a bare root `vitest run` spuriously fails ~50 sdk tests that pass under the real per-package CI command.

gateSpeed.description: CI wall-clock time for the ci.yml workflow (both jobs run in parallel; wall-clock is dominated by the `build` job).

gatePerformance.description: Runner cost & cache efficiency. `toon` is a PUBLIC repo, so GitHub bills $0 regardless of minutes used (billable minutes always report 0 via the Actions API) — raw job-second totals are recorded instead as the cost proxy.

runnerMinutes.unit: raw job-seconds summed across both ci.yml jobs (build + Devbox Environment Validation), NOT GitHub-billed minutes
runnerMinutes.billedMinutesNote: Public repo — GitHub-hosted Actions minutes are free; the Actions API always reports billable.UBUNTU.total_ms=0 for this repo regardless of actual runner time.

cacheHitRate.pnpmDependencyCache: 4/5 (80%) — action: actions/setup-node@v7 with cache: pnpm. The one miss was the run whose pnpm-lock.yaml changed, which correctly invalidates the cache key.
cacheHitRate.devboxCliAndNixStoreCache: 5/5 (100%) — action: jetify-com/devbox-install-action in the Devbox Environment Validation job.

dockerImageSize.note: The .sandcastle/Dockerfile agent image (sandcastle:toon) has no prior run that recorded its size — .github/workflows/agent-image.yml only ever asserted the image builds and its toolchain is correct. This change adds a 'Report agent image size' step (docker image inspect --format '{{.Size}}') to that workflow so the number is captured on its next run. This capture environment has neither a Docker daemon nor push access to trigger that workflow, so the figure could not be filled in here — update this field from that step's log output once available, without re-deriving the rest of the baseline.

gateCorrectness.description: Current violation counts under the existing soft-gate ceiling (`eslint . --max-warnings 940`) and the known-debt typecheck gate. These are the frozen baseline the epic (toon-protocol/toon-meta#210) ratchets toward zero in follow-up slices — this issue only captures the number.

typecheck.note: typecheck is a soft gate (known pre-existing debt, not wired into ci.yml as a blocking step) per toon#110 and the toon Part-of-#111 commit message. This 246 figure matches the ~246 recorded when that debt was carved out.
